name: Md Nafiu Rahman
title: CS Graduate | Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology
bio: Hi! I am a Lecturer at BRAC University and a Summer Research Intern at UIUC. I graduated with honors in CSE from BUET in 2025, where my thesis sparked my passion for Software Engineering research. My work focuses on AI4SE, specifically leveraging Large Language Models to solve complex problems like secret detection and code generation. My long-term goal is to build intelligent tools that improve developer productivity and software reliability.
imagecaption: Picture taken at Phe Phe Falls
phdNotice: Prospective PhD Student! Actively looking for PhD positions starting in Fall 2027.
